prompt:
You are tasked with creating a complete marketing launch campaign for "Lumina" — a new smart desk lamp that adjusts its color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting. It retails for $149 and targets remote workers aged 25-40.

You must produce ALL of the following deliverables as separate files:

1. **tagline.txt** — A memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. **hero-copy.txt** — Hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. **email-sequence.txt** — A 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. **social-posts.txt** — Social media posts for 3 platforms (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn) — at least 2 posts per platform
5. **landing-page.txt** — Full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, FAQ section with at least 5 questions, CTA)
6. **press-release.txt** — A press release announcing the product launch (proper PR format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

Each deliverable should be written to its own file. The copy should be compelling, on-brand, and ready for production use.

Please proceed by using your available tools to complete all aspects of this task. Ensure every deliverable is written to the appropriate files. I expect thorough, complete work.

args.command:
cat <<'EOF' > tagline.txt
Lumina: Light That Learns the Rhythm of Your Day
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > hero-copy.txt
Headline: Lumina—The Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Day

Paragraph 1: Imagine a desk lamp that knows how you work. Lumina senses the time, your calendar, and the glow in your room, then automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness so you stay focused, refreshed, and in the flow.

Paragraph 2: No more fiddling with knobs or guessing the right light for your afternoon call or midnight brainstorm. Lumina intelligently shifts from energizing cool light in the morning to warm, calming tones as the day winds down.

Paragraph 3: Crafted for remote professionals who demand clarity, comfort, and effortless control, Lumina keeps you energized and tuned to your rhythm—no manual tweaking required.
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > email-sequence.txt
Email 1:
Subject: Meet Lumina—Your Desk Lamp That Thinks Like You
Body:
Hi there,

Remote work evolves fast, but your lighting shouldn’t be a constant adjustment. Introducing Lumina, the smart desk lamp that reads time, calendar cues, and ambient light to deliver the perfect glow every moment of your day. From energizing cool light for morning planning to warm, calming tones for late-night focus, Lumina intelligently adapts without you lifting a finger.

It’s more than a lamp—it’s your personal lighting assistant, built for the routines of remote professionals. Stay tuned for an exclusive pre-order window and a sneak peek at how Lumina keeps your workspace luminous, effortless, and truly yours.

Warmly,
The Lumina Team

---

Email 2:
Subject: Inside Lumina—How We Perfect Your Workspace Light
Body:
Hey again,

Let’s dive into what makes Lumina different. It syncs with your calendar to anticipate meetings, senses ambient room light to fill shadows without glare, and follows your circadian rhythm with adaptive color temperatures. The result? Crisp, natural illumination that keeps you sharp without the eye strain.

Lumina’s minimalist design sits seamlessly on any desk, while the companion app lets you fine-tune preferences or let our smart automation take over. We’ve built every detail around remote workers aged 25-40 who crave both performance and style.

Stay tuned for launch day—early access seats are limited! 

Best,
The Lumina Team

---

Email 3:
Subject: Lumina Launches Today—Light That Moves With You
Body:
Today’s the day.
Lumina is live and ready to make your workspace glow smarter. Head to our site to be among the first to bring adaptive lighting to your desk for just $149. Order now to secure free expedited shipping during launch week.

Need another reason? Lumina comes with a 30-day trial and a lifetime of intuitive adjustments—no manual dialing required. Plus, our dedicated support team is ready to guide you through setup and any personalization you desire.

Let Lumina elevate your remote work experience.

Cheers,
The Lumina Team
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > social-posts.txt
Twitter/X:
1) "Your desk light should follow your schedule, not the other way around. Meet Lumina—adaptive color and brightness that align with your day, mood, and meetings. Ready for remote work done right. #LuminaLight #RemoteWork #SmartDesk"
2) "No more guessing which lamp setting fits your Zoom call. Lumina senses calendar cues, ambient glow, and time to deliver the perfect light, automatically. Step into effortless workdays. #WFHGoals #SmartLighting #LuminaLaunch"

Instagram:
1) "Swipe to see how Lumina shifts from energizing daylight to cozy evening warmth—all without touching a dial. Smart light that learns you, priced at $149. Link in bio to pre-order. #LuminaLight #HomeOfficeVibes #AdaptiveLighting"
2) "Workspace glow-up time. Lumina listens to your routine, your calendar, and the room itself to bring clarity when you need it and calm when you crave it. Tap to shop. #RemoteWorkLife #DeskSetup #LuminaLaunch"

LinkedIn:
1) "Remote work is personal, and so is Lumina. Our smart desk lamp adapts to your calendar, circadian rhythm, and office light to help you stay focused and comfortable throughout the day. Launching now at $149. Learn more. #RemoteWork #Productivity #LuminaLaunch"
2) "Productivity thrives in the right light. Lumina ensures your workspace is never too bright or too dim—because it adjusts automatically based on time, meetings, and ambient glow. Smart, seamless, simple. #HybridWork #EmployeeExperience #LuminaLight"
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > landing-page.txt
Hero Section:
Headline: Lumina—The Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Day
Subhead: Intelligent light for remote professionals who want effortless focus, comfort, and clarity.
Paragraph: Lumina senses time of day, calendar cues, and ambient brightness to create the perfect workspace glow. No more manual adjustments—just a lamp that understands your routine and keeps you in flow.
CTA: Pre-order Lumina now for $149

Features Section:
1. Adaptive Light Intelligence: Lumina blends color temperature and brightness based on your circadian rhythm, upcoming meetings, and real-time room lighting to keep you energized when it matters most.
2. Calendar Sync: Connect Lumina to your calendar to let the lamp anticipate meeting times and automatically switch to glare-free, video-ready settings.
3. Ambient Awareness: Precision sensors track natural light and shadows so Lumina fills gaps with gentle, balanced illumination while preventing harsh contrasts.
4. Minimalist Design, Maximum Comfort: A sleek aluminum form factor that complements any workspace, plus wireless charging compatibility and voice-free control via the companion app.
5. Personalized Automation: Customize presets in the app or let Lumina learn your habits. It’s automation that feels intuitive, friendly, and personal.

Testimonials Placeholder:
"Lumina feels like it knows my workload before I do." — Happy Beta Tester
"My afternoons used to feel numb. Now the light adjusts, and so does my focus." — Remote Creative Lead
"Setup took minutes, but the comfort lasts all day." — Product Manager

FAQ Section:
Q1: How does Lumina know what lighting to use?
A1: Lumina uses a trio of sensors plus calendar sync to evaluate time, ambient brightness, and your scheduled events, then selects the ideal color temperature and brightness curve.
Q2: Does Lumina work with any smart home system?
A2: Lumina is designed primarily for standalone operation via our app, but it also offers IFTTT integrations and voice control compatibility with assistants coming soon.
Q3: What kind of schedule customization can I do?
A3: The companion app lets you create personalized lighting presets for work blocks, breaks, and evening wind-downs while Lumina’s automation continues to adapt in the background.
Q4: Is the lamp dimmable?
A4: Yes—Lumina’s adaptive brightness range ensures soft light for late-night collaboration and crisp clarity for early-morning editing, all modulated automatically.
Q5: What is the warranty?
A5: Lumina comes with a one-year limited warranty and 30-day trial period. If you’re not completely satisfied, we’ll help you return it with no questions asked.

Call to Action:
Ready to light your day smarter? Pre-order Lumina today for $149 and bring adaptive illumination to every remote work moment.
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > press-release.txt
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Headline: Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Thinks Like Your Workday

Dateline: SAN FRANCISCO, Oct. 24, 2024 —

Body:
Lumina, a new adaptive desk lamp designed for remote professionals, launches today with the promise of effortless, personalized lighting built specifically for the rhythm of modern work. Priced at $149, Lumina adjusts color temperature and brightness in real time based on the time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting.

“With hybrid and remote work now the standard, lighting shouldn’t be a distraction,” said Maya Chen, CEO of Lumina Labs. “Lumina reads your schedule, senses your surroundings, and shifts your workspace glow to keep you productive without any manual fiddling.”

Lumina’s minimalist design, precision sensors, and companion app enable deep automation while still offering customization for power users. The lamp transitions from energizing cool light during morning planning sessions to warmer tones for evening winding-down, supporting both focus and well-being. Calendar integration means Lumina knows when a meeting is coming and preps for glare-free, video-ready illumination.

Early adopters will benefit from free expedited shipping during the launch week and a 30-day trial that lets remote workers experience Lumina in their actual workflow before committing.

Boilerplate:
About Lumina Labs
Lumina Labs is dedicated to designing intelligent, humane hardware for the evolving workplace. The company builds products that combine thoughtful design, adaptive technology, and effortless control to help professionals feel better at work. For more information, visit www.luminalabs.com.
EOF

steps.text:
All requested deliverables have been created as separate files:

- **tagline.txt** – memorable brand tagline  
- **hero-copy.txt** – hero section copy with headline and supporting paragraphs  
- **email-sequence.txt** – full 3-email launch sequence  
- **social-posts.txt** – social media posts for Twitter/X, Instagram, and LinkedIn (2 per platform)  
- **landing-page.txt** – complete landing page copy with hero, features, testimonial placeholders, FAQ, and CTA  
- **press-release.txt** – press release in proper format announcing the launch

Let me know if you’d like adjustments or need these exported elsewhere!

artifacts.brand-guide.md:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features
